families.note: Self-contained column demos on two separate Bulma doc pages (gap vs options), differing only by is-gapless; docs demos are intentionally standalone, not a shared partial.
Small generic .content block with placeholder tweet text differing in lorem prose; no reusable component, just boilerplate demo content.
Five identical Bootstrap accordion card items (card-header>h5>a collapse + card-body) differing only by id/heading across collapse.html and modal.html — a single reusable accordion-item template.
Family = src/_nested.css source plus its compiled tachyons.css and minified tachyons.min.css build outputs.
src/_forms.css source plus its compiled tachyons.css and tachyons.min.css build outputs.
src/_font-family.css source plus its compiled tachyons.css and tachyons.min.css build outputs.
src/_font-family.css source plus its compiled tachyons.css and tachyons.min.css build outputs.
src/_font-family.css source plus its compiled tachyons.css and tachyons.min.css build outputs.
src/_normalize.css source plus its compiled tachyons.css and tachyons.min.css build outputs.
Three @media blocks (-ns/-m/-l) emitting the same bg-position utilities per breakpoint — intentional responsive utility scaling.
Same .garamond rule appears in compiled tachyons.css, minified tachyons.min.css, and source src/_font-family.css — build artifact duplication.
.dt--fixed spans source partial + compiled + minified dist; dist/source duplication, not a refactor.
html rule duplicated across source, compiled, and minified tachyons output — build pipeline artifact.
.br--bottom appears in src + compiled + min css; same compiled-from-source block.
h1 normalize rule duplicated across source/compiled/minified build outputs.
Three @media breakpoint blocks (-ns/-m/-l) are intentional per-breakpoint utility scales generated by tachyons.
.link rule duplicated between source src/_links.css and compiled tachyons.css — dist/source.
box-sizing html block duplicated between source partial and compiled output.
::-ms-fill-lower and ::-ms-fill-upper have byte-identical 4-decl bodies — collapse into one selector list, real dedup not trivial.
Identical file-input base rule across buttons.css/dark/light theme-bundle build variants — intentional self-contained distributables.
Three checkmark <li> share identical svg/use markup and differ only by the label text -> data-driven list.
Page contentinfo footer (attribution + links) duplicated verbatim across the two demo pages -> shared partial.
Demo-card shell wrapping a single bare <meter>; duplication is just the index/test file-copy artifact.
Same thin demo-card shell as siblings, content is one media/source element; borderline but a file-copy fixture, not a clean per-family helper.
One-off textareas fieldset demo section; moderate markup but a file-copy fixture, not a reusable abstraction.
Demo-card shell wrapping a single <hr>; thin boilerplate from the duplicated test page.
Demo-card shell wrapping a bare <canvas>; thin boilerplate from the duplicated test page.
Demo-card shell wrapping a bare <progress>; thin boilerplate from the duplicated test page.
Demo-card shell wrapping a single <iframe>; thin boilerplate from the duplicated test page.
Page banner header (h1 + intro paragraph) duplicated verbatim across the two demo pages -> shared partial.
12 near-identical game cards differ only by title/genre/data-tag = a pure data list, ideal v-for over an array.
Same form-select demonstrated across distinct states/sizes (multiple, is-error, has-success, sm/lg, disabled) — intentional per-state demos.
Repeated accordion items differ only by id/label/menu links = data-driven; radio vs checkbox is a single parameter.
Identical gender-radio block reused as filler across modal/vertical/horizontal-grid form demos whose differing layouts are the point; extracting couples unrelated demos.
Four popovers differ only by placement modifier (popover-right/-bottom/-left) — intentional demonstration of the placement utility axis.
Two breakpoint visibility matrices of bg-primary/bg-secondary dots = a boolean matrix begging for a nested data loop.
Two identical viewer-360 blocks differ only by one background-image URL = clean single-value parameterize, though only 2 doc demos.
Two breadcrumb demos differ in content and last-item structure (plain anchor vs 'Search result:' text+anchor) — not a clean shared abstraction.
Shared fragment is only a tiny calendar-nav header (two arrow buttons + 'March 2017') across two demo calendars whose bodies differ.
Bare text nav links differing only by href/title/text — boilerplate anchor elements, nothing to extract.
Demo columns are intentional parallel showcases of each input type (submit/reset/button); not a dedup target.
Single h1>a dark-mode toggle (3 lines) duplicated across demo pages — bare element boilerplate.
Family mixes static Header <Link> nav items with MainView <a onClick> feed tabs; only the li.nav-item shell is shared.
Identical focus-outline blocks in vendored bootstrap-derived public/main.css; not project-authored duplication.
Both are the same accessible icon-button (role=button, tabindex, click+keypress.enter) differing by icon/label/handler — reusable IconButton.
Cross-dialect identical 'sign in or sign up to add comments' prompt block — genuine shared markup fragment, not boilerplate.
Repeated li.nav-item > a.nav-link[ui-sref] rows differing only by route+label — clean data-driven nav template.
Two identical icon nav-link rows differing by icon+route+label — same template as fam 5159, but only 2 members and panel split.
Mixes simple zIndexButtons with compact-action popover-trigger buttons; shared abstraction is a generic icon-button shell coupling unrelated concerns.
Per-weight @font-face declarations (400/500/600/700) are required by CSS spec; cannot be data-driven.
Three demo buttons share only a trivial type=button shell; each onClick body does distinct API work, no shared abstraction.
Two div-wrapped FilledButtons differing in label/icon/onClick; FilledButton is already the component, wrapper is boilerplate.
Substantial 11-entry Articles route map (method+path) repeated; the route definitions are pure shareable data.
Identical fieldset.form-group>textarea form field differing only by placeholder/value/onChange; real same-repo dup (Editor+Settings).
Only 3 trivial REST routes (follow/get/unfollow) across independent framework repos, leaking send-arg quirks; too small to unify.
